title: macOSMinimumOperatingSystem

v10_10.description: Indicates the minimum OS X version support required for the managed device. When 'True', macOS with OS X 10.10 or later is required to install the app. If 'False', OS X Version 10.10 is not the minimum version. Default value is False. Exactly one of the minimum operating system boolean values will be TRUE.

description: The minimum operating system required for a macOS app.
